title: Meters and deposits; penalty
doc_html:
§851.  Meters and deposits; penalty

Whoever violates R.S. 45:845 through 45:850 shall be fined not less than twenty-five dollars and not more than two hundred dollars for each offense.
doc_text:
§851.  Meters and deposits; penalty
Whoever violates R.S. 45:845 through 45:850 shall be fined not less than twenty-five dollars and not more than two hundred dollars for each offense.
